_readme: The About page. statement: your artist bio paragraph. photo: paste an image path here (e.g. /paintings/lerly-thumb.webp) to replace the placeholder; leave "" to keep it. materials: the small line under the photo.
statement: I create vibrant, expressive pet portraits using bold brushstrokes and unexpected color to capture not just how a pet looks, but who they are. Every portrait is hand-painted in acrylic with rich texture, movement, and personality.
